containers.name: train
args: set -e; export HOME=/shared/ssd/home/b-a-kumar; export HF_HOME=/shared/ssd/home/b-a-kumar/.cache/huggingface; export HF_TOKEN=''; export GIT_CONFIG_NOSYSTEM=1; export GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL=/dev/null; mkdir -p /shared/ssd/home/b-a-kumar; cd /shared/ssd/home/b-a-kumar; if [ ! -d nn-dataset ]; then git clone -b age-estimation-model https://github.com/Arun03k/nn-dataset.git nn-dataset; else cd nn-dataset && git pull origin age-estimation-model && cd ..; fi; cd /shared/ssd/home/b-a-kumar/nn-dataset; export PYTHONPATH=/shared/ssd/home/b-a-kumar/nn-dataset:$PYTHONPATH; python3 -m pip install -e . -q; echo '--- GPU Check ---'; python3 -c "import torch; print(f'CUDA: {torch.cuda.is_available()}, Device: {torch.cuda.get_device_name(0) if torch.cuda.is_available() else CPU}')" ; echo '--- Starting Training ---'; python3 train_age_estimation.py 2>&1; echo '--- Training Finished ---'
